description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a fitted knit sweater, tapered pants, and high-top athletic sneakers. The individual wears a beanie hat, adding to the streetwear-inspired look. The figure's build is muscular and athletic, with broad shoulders and a straight posture. The hands are relaxed and slightly extended at the sides, and the head is slightly tilted forward. The shoes are detailed with visible laces and a high-contrast design, while the sweater and pants have a matte, fabric-like appearance. The overall style suggests a modern, active city dweller prepared for cool weather.
description: A muscular adult male in casual streetwear, including a knit sweater, tapered pants, beanie, and high-top sneakers. The figure stands upright with a relaxed, confident posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the beanie, sweater, pants, and sneakers clearly, with arms slightly out and full facial features obscured by shadow.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beanie, the fit of the sweater and pants, and the side details of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the beanie, sweater, and pants, as well as the heel and back design of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the clothing and footwear, with the head turned slightly forward.
attribute_clothing_type: casual knit sweater, tapered pants, beanie hat, athletic high-top sneakers
